DLC_000.title: Pre-order Pack
DLC_000.fullText:
Pre-order Pack

- Playable characters unlocked early (x6):
  Gogeta (Super)
  Gogeta (Super), Super Saiyan
  Gogeta (Super), Super Saiyan God Super Saiyan
  Broly (Super)
  Broly (Super), Super Saiyan
  Broly (Super), Super Saiyan (Full Power)
- Playable character:
  Goku (Mini)

DLC_001.title: Ultimate Upgrade Pack
DLC_001.fullText:
Ultimate Upgrade Pack

- Costume: Goku (Super) Costume 8: Power Pole Outfit
- Player Cards (x2)
  Player Card 11
  Player Card 12
- Ability Item: Almighty Boost
- Emote Voiceover Collection (x30)
  Emote Voiceover Collection 4 for the following characters:
  Goku (Z - Early)
  Goku (Z - Mid), Super Saiyan
  Goku (Super)
  Goku (Super), Ultra Instinct -Sign-
  Goku (Super), Ultra Instinct
  Vegeta (Z - Scouter)
  Vegeta (Z - Early), Super Saiyan
  Vegeta (Super), Super Saiyan
  Great Saiyaman
  Ultimate Gohan
  Piccolo (Fused with Kami)
  Yamcha
  Trunks (Sword)
  Future Trunks, Super Saiyan
  Super Vegito
  Vegito, Super Saiyan God Super Saiyan
  Master Roshi
  Frieza (Z), 1st Form
  Frieza (Z), 4th Form
  Frieza (Super)
  Cell, Perfect Form
  Super Buu (Gohan Absorbed)
  Android 17 (Super)
  Android 18
  Goku Black, Super Saiyan Rosé
  Zamasu
  Fused Zamasu
  Hit
  Jiren, Full Power
  Ribrianne

DLC_002.title: Summon Super Shenron
DLC_002.fullText:
Summon Super Shenron

Can summon Super Shenron 1 time and have a wish granted.
*This will allow you to choose certain benefits to
receive, like unlocking characters or gaining Zeni.

DLC_003.title: Anime Music Pack 1
DLC_003.fullText:
Anime Music Pack 1

Classic Anime OP/ED & BGM (11 Tracks)
*Can be used as BGM in regular battles, Custom Battles, and more.

DLC_004.title: Anime Music Pack 2
DLC_004.fullText:
Anime Music Pack 2

Classic Anime OP/ED & BGM (12 Tracks)
*Can be used as BGM in regular battles, Custom Battles, and more.

DLC_005.title: Victory Pack
DLC_005.fullText:
Victory Pack

- Accessory: V Jump Aura
*Can only be used with certain characters
- Ability Item: Victory Power

DLC_006.title: Martial Arts Pack
DLC_006.fullText:
Martial Arts Pack

- Playable characters unlocked early (x3)
  Bardock
  Gohan (Future)
  Gohan (Future), Super Saiyan
- Costume: Bardock Costume 2
- Ability Item: Super Sparking!

DLC_007.title: Summon Shenron
DLC_007.fullText:
Summon Shenron

Can summon Shenron 1 time and have a wish granted.
*This will allow you to receive certain benefits,
like costumes and Zeni.

DLC_009.title: "Heroes of Justice" Pack
DLC_009.fullText:
"Heroes of Justice" Pack

- Playable characters (x11)
  Gohan (Super Hero)
  Gohan (Super Hero), Super Saiyan
  Ultimate Gohan (Super Hero)
  Gohan Beast
  Piccolo (Super Hero)
  Piccolo (Super Hero), Power Awakening
  Orange Piccolo
  Orange Piccolo, Giant Form
  Gamma 1
  Gamma 2
  Cell Max
- Outfits
  Piccolo (Super Hero) / Piccolo (Super Hero), Power Awakening Outfit 2
- 3 Bonus Battles
  "Outshine Grandfather"
  "Cell Max Games are underway"
  "Unleash Beast power!"

DLC_010.title: Dragon Ball DAIMA Character Pack 1
DLC_010.fullText:
Dragon Ball DAIMA Character Pack 1

- Playable characters (x9)
  Goku (Mini)
  Goku (Mini), Super Saiyan
  Vegeta (Mini)
  Vegeta (Mini), Super Saiyan
  Vegeta (Mini), Super Saiyan 2
  Vegeta (Mini), Super Saiyan 3
  Glorio
  Panzy
  Majin Kuu

DLC_011.title: Dragon Ball DAIMA Character Pack 2
DLC_011.fullText:
Dragon Ball DAIMA Character Pack 2

- Playable characters (x6)
  Goku (Mini), Super Saiyan 4
  Goku (DAIMA), Super Saiyan 4
  Vegeta (DAIMA), Super Saiyan 3
  Majin Duu
  Third Eye Gomah
  Giant Gomah

DLC_012.title: Shallot (DRAGON BALL LEGENDS)
DLC_012.fullText:
Shallot (DRAGON BALL LEGENDS)

- Playable characters (x1)
  Shallot
